lesson.title: Answer out loud
lesson.text: Jane stood at the front door, her heart pounding with anticipation. Today was her first day at a new school, and she couldn't help but feel a mix of excitement and anxiety. What was Jane anxious about?

translations.Somali: Jane waxay istaagtay albaabka hore, wadnaheeda oo garaacaya cabsida awgeed. Maanta waa maalinteedii ugu horreysay ee iskuul cusub, waxeyna dareemeysaa isku darka farxad iyo walwal. Maxay Jane ka walwalsan tahay?

lesson.title: Answer out loud
lesson.text: Right, it was her first day at a new school. She adjusted the straps of her backpack, double-checking to make sure she had everything she needed: notebooks, pencils, and her favorite lunchbox. How did she deal with her anxiety?

translations.Somali: Sax, maanta waa maalinteedii ugu horreysay ee iskuul cusub. Waxay hagaajisay suumanka boorsadeeda dhabarka, iyadoo hubinaysa inay wax walba sidato: buugaag, qalinno, iyo sanduuqa qadadeeda ugu jeceshahay. Sidee bay ula tacaashay walwalkeeda?

lesson.title: Answer out loud
lesson.text: She adjusted the straps of her backpack. She made sure everything is in order for the day. Her mother gave her a reassuring hug and a kiss on the forehead. —You'll do great, sweetheart. Just be yourself and have fun— she said with a warm smile. What did her mother do?

translations.Somali: Waxay hagaajisay suumanka boorsadeeda dhabarka. Waxay hubisay in wax walba u diyaar yihiin maalintaas. Hooyadeed waxay siisay hug iyo dhunkasho qaboow. —Waxaad sameyn doontaa wax weyn, macaanto. Kaliya naftaada noqo oo raaxayso— ayay tiri iyadoo dhoolla-caddaynaysa. Maxay hooyadeed sameysay?

lesson.title: Answer out loud
lesson.text: She gave her a reassuring hug and a kiss on her forehead. The walk to the bus stop was filled with thoughts racing through her mind. She wondered what her new classmates would be like and if she would make friends easily. How was her walk?

translations.Somali: Waxay siisay hug qaboow iyo dhunkasho dhabanka. Socodka ilaa saldhigga baska waxaa buuxiyay fikirro maskaxdeeda ku ordaya. Waxay isweydiisay ardayda cusub ee iskuulka iyo haddii ay si fudud saaxiibo u heli doonto. Sidee bay ahayd socodkeedu?

lesson.title: Answer out loud
lesson.text: It was alright, her mind was racing. She had racing thoughts through her mind. When she arrived at the bus stop, she saw a few other kids waiting, some chatting excitedly, others looking just as nervous as she felt. Did she start talking to the kids right away?

translations.Somali: Way fiicnayd, maskaxdeedu way orodaysay. Waxay lahayd fikirro maskaxdeeda ku ordaya. Markii ay timid saldhigga baska, waxay aragtay carruur kale oo sugaya, qaar si farxad leh u sheekaysanaya, qaar kalena u eg sida ay iyadaba dareemaysay oo kale. Ma bilowday inay carruurta isla markiiba la hadasho?

lesson.title: Answer out loud
lesson.text: No, no, not right away. She felt nervous, and there were other nervous kids on the bus as well. She gazed out the window, watching familiar streets turn into new ones as the bus carried her toward this new chapter in her life.

translations.Somali: Maya, maya, isla markiiba ma aysan bilaabin. Way dareemaysay welwel, waxayna aragtay carruur kale oo iyaguna welwel ka muuqdo baska. Waxay daawatay daaqadda, iyadoo fiirinaysa waddooyinka ay taqaanay oo isu beddelaya kuwa cusub, maadaama baska uu u qaadayay wajigan cusub ee nolosheeda.
